name: MS theme Jekyll
description: MS 2 column Jekyll theme flex and grid based.
author: Mohammad Shamshad

scripts.uglify: uglifyjs assets/js/vendor/jquery/jquery-4.0.0.js assets/js/plugins/jquery.fitvids.js assets/js/plugins/jquery.greedy-navigation.js assets/js/plugins/jquery.magnific-popup.js assets/js/plugins/jquery.ba-throttle-debounce.js assets/js/plugins/smooth-scroll.js assets/js/plugins/gumshoe.js assets/js/_main.js -c -m -o assets/js/main.min.js
scripts.build:js: npm run uglify && npm run add-banner
